If 2nd in CHAIN, heal for 5 health.
if your next ATTACK MISSES, -5 to next enemies ACCURACY.
Override the next action with the previous action
for the next 4 ATTACKS: +20 DAMAGE to WEAPON. Weapon Damage decreases by 5 each Attack
